response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed video to identify scenes: Intro (00:00-00:23), Performance (00:23-04:30), Outro (04:30-04:55). 2. Performer identified as Moona Hoshinova based on visual recognition and content. 3. Extracted metadata from on-screen text: Song 'Hibari', Lyrics: Gohgo, Music: Yuuki Otawora. 4. Searched for 'ヒバリ Gohgo Yuuki Otawora 歌詞'. Identified the lyrics as matching the version by Knight A, which matches the performance in the video. 5. Translated Japanese lyrics into English. 6. Generated JSON with complete lyrics in both languages and appropriate scene breaks.
response.global_summary: The video features a vocal performance of the song 'Hibari' by the VTuber Moona Hoshinova, preceded by an introductory segment and followed by a brief outro.

scenes.description: Introductory segment where the performer greets the audience and introduces the song.
The performer sings the song 'Hibari' while dancing. The song title, lyricist, and composer are displayed on-screen.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
色のない毎日
降り頻る篠突く雨
明けない夜はないと、頬濡らした
人知れぬ刹那に琴線に触れよう
月夜に照らされた灯りが決戦
あの日始まった想ゐ紡いでいけ

胸に響くたった一欠片の想ゐ
今、自分の好きを守るために、己の道を突き進め
dark the night , call the knight
君と進むべきこの羅針盤
愛すべきもの守るために、己の好きを突き進め
don’t cry shine the night
僕と
never look back , just go forward

雲雀が羽ばたいた時、一輪の花が咲いた
その瞬間から毎日が色づいてった
たとえ、世界が君の敵になっても
君を愛し抜くため、今日も生きる
さぁ、君の明日を守るために、己の好きを突き進め
into the night , shine the light
これが俺たちの生き様だ
僕の使命を果たすために、一心不乱に突き進め
shine the knight , shine the heart
君と
never look back , just go forever

刀折れ矢尽きたとしても
この狭く冷たい世界、繋がり求めた
敗北も挫折も失敗もすべて飲み込んで
今、自分の好きを守るために、己の道を突き進め
dark the night , call the knight
君と進むべきこの羅針盤
愛すべきもの守るために、己の好きを突き進め
don’t cry shine the night
僕と
never look back , just go forward
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Days without color
The rain pours down relentlessly
"There's no night that doesn't dawn," I said, wetting my cheeks
Let's touch the heartstrings in a moment no one knows
The light illuminated in the moonlit night is the decisive battle
Spin the feelings that started that day

A single fragment of feelings resonating in my heart
Now, to protect what I like, push forward on my own path
Dark the night, call the knight
This compass I should follow with you
To protect what I should love, push forward with what I like
Don't cry shine the night
With me
Never look back, just go forward

When the skylark flapped its wings, a single flower bloomed
From that moment, every day became colorful
Even if the world becomes your enemy
I will live today to love you to the end
Now, to protect your tomorrow, push forward with what I like
Into the night, shine the light
This is the way we live
To fulfill my mission, push forward with all my might
Shine the knight, shine the heart
With you
Never look back, just go forever

Even if the sword breaks and the arrows are spent
In this narrow, cold world, I sought connection
Swallowing up defeats, frustrations, and failures alike
Now, to protect what I like, push forward on my own path
Dark the night, call the knight
This compass I should follow with you
To protect what I should love, push forward with what I like
Don't cry shine the night
With me
Never look back, just go forward

scenes.description: Outro segment, the song concludes, and the performer says goodbye.
